# WhatsApp Chat Analyzer

A Streamlit-based web application that analyzes exported WhatsApp chats and provides meaningful insights through visualizations and statistics.

## Features

* Total Messages Analysis
* Total Words Count
* Media Shared Analysis
* Links Shared Analysis
* Monthly Timeline
* Daily Timeline
* Most Active Users
* Weekly Activity Heatmap
* Word Cloud Generation
* Most Common Words Analysis
* Emoji Analysis
* Monthly Activity Map

## Tech Stack

* Python
* Pandas
* Streamlit
* Matplotlib
* Seaborn
* WordCloud
* URLExtract

## Project Structure

```
WhatsApp-Chat-Analyzer/
│
├── app.py
├── helper.py
├── preprocessor.py
├── stop_hinglish.txt
├── requirements.txt
├── README.md
└── .gitignore
```

## Installation

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
streamlit run app.py
```
